status_override_reason: A6 (rule_pc_cng) candidate SMILES are identical to A2 (random_corruption) in every group of the frozen v1 manifest; the A6 arm empirically reproduces A2 (bit-identical Chemformer scores) and therefore provides no evidence about rule PC-CNG augmentation. A6 also does not beat the best non-PC-CNG negative baseline (A5 unconstrained_edit on chemformer, A3 tanimoto_retrieval on GNN).
limitations: Frozen v1 manifest duplicates random_corruption SMILES under the rule_pc_cng label in all 500 groups (P4-G1 construction issue); rule PC-CNG augmentation effect is untestable on v1 manifest.
A v2 manifest with genuinely rule-generated PC-CNG candidates is required before any PC-CNG augmentation claim can be made.
Rule PC-CNG (A6) did not beat the best simple negative baseline on either backbone under the frozen v1 candidate manifest.
